correction_sql.description: SQL that safely applies approved duplicate correction case DQ-TKT-2026-03-B to the shared SQLite database.

changed_ticket_count.description: Number of ticket rows intentionally changed by correction_sql.

qualified_ticket_count_after_fix.description: Count of qualified March 2026 AtlasDB customer-impacting defect tickets after the correction.

backlog_by_severity.description: Backlog ticket counts by normalized severity after the correction. Include zero-valued severities.

sla_breach_rate_after_fix.description: Decimal ratio rounded to four places.

accounts_to_notify.ordering: Sort by descending backlog_ticket_count, ascending highest_severity priority P1-P4, then ascending account_id.
